title: The effects of interest rates
description: Practice understanding of positive and negative effects of increase/decrease in interest rates

assessment_items.question_content:
An increase or decrease in interest rates can result in both pros and cons.

**How does an increase in interest rates affect your savings account?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: It decreases the earnings of your savings.
The earnings in your savings are not affected.
It gives you more earnings in your savings account.

assessment_items.question_content:
Fluctuations in interest rates can have both good and bad effects.

**Which loan type is not affected by rising interest rates?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

Rate adjustments can have both positive and negative effects.

**As a consumer, how might an increase in interest rates influence the prices of goods and services?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: There will be no change in prices.

assessment_items.question_content:
Changes in interest rates can cause both pleasant and unpleasant results.

**How does an increase in interest rates impact car loans?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: It makes financing a car cheaper.
It makes financing a car more expensive.
It does not affect financing a car.
Rates will be lowered on existing car loans.

assessment_items.question_content:
Moves in interest rates can result in both positives and negatives.

**How does a rise in the federal rate influence adjustable-rate mortgage payments?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: It doesn't affect them until refinanced.

assessment_items.question_content:
Any shift in interest rates can have positive or negative outcomes on [[☃ definition 1]] .

**What happens to the APR on most credit cards when interest rates increase?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

options.definition: annual rate charged for borrowing money.

assessment_items.question_content:
Interest rate changes can bring good and bad outcomes.

**How are car loans affected when interest rates fall?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: Financing a car will become less expensive.
Financing a car will become more expensive.
Car loan interest rates will be unaffected.

assessment_items.question_content:
Adjustments in interest rates can have good and bad impacts.

**Interest rates falling is good news for which group?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

Changes in interest rates can create both good and bad results.

**How can a lower interest rate potentially affect credit card owners?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: It can allow faster debt reduction.
It can add on to the existing debt.
It can lead to increased APR.

assessment_items.question_content:
A switch of interest rates can bring both helpful and unhelpful effects.

**What potential disadvantages could savers face when interest rates are falling?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: Their savings will generate smaller returns.
Their savings account value will drop.
They will lose all their savings.
They will earn significantly more interest.

assessment_items.question_content:
Changes in interest rates can have both helpful and unhelpful impacts.

**Interest rates falling is bad news for which group?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

Both positive and negative effects can come from interest rate shifts.

**What is the effect of a lower federal rate on private student loans?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: It decreases the payment on the loans.
It increases the payment on the loans.
It has no effect on payments.
